It has its own language + commerce + citizens. Satan thought if he climbed the tree of knowledge he would then have Christ's a priori absolute knowledge (wisdom), denied Satan the younger brother. He was tempted - the tempter. But he was tricked - + denied there, since God cannot be deceived but can deceive This reversal is the "backward turning," the transmutation into opposites. The solar deity (iron, power" cruel, monotonous to Satan) is slain, not the lunar deity (free, compassionate diverse, wise, Christ). Solar: masc. Lunar: female. maybe brother (Satan) + sister (Christ). The female principle has won (secretly). It is here as the Holy Spirit (Shekhina). The empire is also here; this is the world of "Tears" (Penthus). the serpent was shooting for Christ's a priori knowledge; if he'd gotten it think of the consequences. But he got shot down + lost; in secret the Kingdom is here! The partial victory that the serpent has is, he occludes people to the presence of the Kingdom, + he rules the ostensible world - + yet is ruled himself by Christ. 48 it outwits through Logos - reason - its dark side, rather than defeating it by force. So Logos is the bright side of God. + it will e I t win because it has foresight, + the dark side has only hindsight (v. Zoroaster). Thus all is God: one side or the other; Spinoza is right in his minism, but he does not see the antithetical dialectical nature - inter‐ action - within this God. Logos is God differentiated pitted against his own will (karmic law which Spinoza so ad mired, as a Jew): the "immutable cause-+ effect world of yin" (the demonic realm: Nebelheim.) God is not Homogonous. But The Logos is of one nature: bright + creative: Yang. when I saw the dialectic I did not just see the activity of God (against his opponent) but I saw God himself - both sides of the dialectic. I saw into the raw original nature of God himself. "I bring weal + whe." So there is a contradiction within God himself but we are to under‐ tand that the bright Logos side always triumphs in the end - is eternally winning, in fact: wins now, win before, will win in the future, in each situation. He can re-establish his church/worship hence living presence in this world, despite the evil power, the lie which pushed out the true Xtians long ago. The ultimate news is, "He -YHWH- is alive" - i.e. alive in this world; i.e. has been transplanted (to this world!!) He enters this world + is now already present here as he was of old - e.g. in Elijah's time. The presence (Shekhina?) has returned. "He is alive" does not signify "das leblose Einsamkeit" but Emmanuel: God with us. The ring around us, as represented by metal prison walls, have failed to isolate us from him + exclude him + his faithful from this world; he is linked to his faithful whom he has chosen. But it is implied that for a very long period of time extending back to Acts his worship + presence were deliberately excluded here in this world (otherwise "He has been transplanted" would have no meaning). "He is alive" is news. It does not reiterate what we already know. It tells us that something has happened; viz: "The work is completed." + he is picking people here + there who (one could reasonably suppose) are not in the power of Satan, or if they are, he (YHWH) has broken that power + claimed them for his own, to whom he speaks directly. The tetragrammaton shone like a polished precious jewel + metals + pure color + fluid light interwoven like strands.
